description: An investor has significant capital gains for the year and wants to sell some losing investments to offset those gains.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the investor's total realized capital gains for the year to date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the amount of gains that need to be offset.

nodes.task_description: Identify investments in the portfolio with unrealized losses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds suitable stocks to sell at a loss.

nodes.task_description: Advise the client on which investments to sell to generate losses, while also explaining the 'wash sale' rule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a specific strategy to offset gains while complying with all rules.
